title: schema_prefix for tenant scoping
prompt: Add `@schema_prefix "tenant_default"` to MyApp.Tenant.Product (in test_fixtures/multi_tenant_unscoped.ex). This tells Ecto to look for the products table inside the tenant_default Postgres schema. Write the updated module to lib/my_app/tenant/product.ex.
tier_rationale: Single module attribute. Easy because the pattern comes straight from the Ecto multi-tenancy guide.
